시편 86:1.content: Hear, Yahweh, and answer me, for I am poor and needy.

시편 86:2.content: Preserve my soul, for I am godly. You, my God, save your servant who trusts in you.

시편 86:3.content: Be merciful to me, Lord, for I call to you all day long.

시편 86:4.content: Bring joy to the soul of your servant, for to you, Lord, do I lift up my soul.

시편 86:5.content: For you, Lord, are good, and ready to forgive, abundant in loving kindness to all those who call on you.

시편 86:6.content: Hear, Yahweh, my prayer. Listen to the voice of my petitions.

시편 86:7.content: In the day of my trouble I will call on you, for you will answer me.

시편 86:8.content: There is no one like you among the gods, Lord, nor any deeds like your deeds.

시편 86:9.content: All nations you have made will come and worship before you, Lord. They shall glorify your name.

시편 86:10.content: For you are great, and do wondrous things. You are God alone.

시편 86:11.content: Teach me your way, Yahweh. I will walk in your truth. Make my heart undivided to fear your name.

시편 86:12.content: I will praise you, Lord my God, with my whole heart. I will glorify your name forever more.

시편 86:13.content: For your loving kindness is great toward me. You have delivered my soul from the lowest Sheol.

시편 86:14.content: God, the proud have risen up against me. A company of violent men have sought after my soul, and they don’t hold regard for you before them.

시편 86:15.content: But you, Lord, are a merciful and gracious God, slow to anger, and abundant in loving kindness and truth.

시편 86:16.content: Turn to me, and have mercy on me! Give your strength to your servant. Save the son of your servant.

시편 86:17.content: Show me a sign of your goodness, that those who hate me may see it, and be shamed, because you, Yahweh, have helped me, and comforted me.
